implemented_capabilities.current_evidence_boundary: Validates public source registry structure and entries.
implemented_capabilities.next_evidence_step: Keep source records aligned with dataset and benchmark metadata.

implemented_capabilities.current_evidence_boundary: Generates public dataset-card examples from local metadata.
implemented_capabilities.next_evidence_step: Add richer review status and source limitations as cards mature.

implemented_capabilities.current_evidence_boundary: Generates public acquisition-plan metadata without executing acquisition.
implemented_capabilities.next_evidence_step: Add acquisition readiness checks only after access and release policy are reviewed.
Keep task definitions tied to explicit labels, metrics, splits, and limitations.

implemented_capabilities.current_evidence_boundary: Generates benchmark-card examples for reviewable task definitions.
implemented_capabilities.next_evidence_step: Expand cards as benchmark contracts stabilize.
Add evidence review status and uncertainty fields as source coverage grows.

implemented_capabilities.current_evidence_boundary: Generates deterministic output-package examples for benchmark review.
implemented_capabilities.next_evidence_step: Connect future benchmark outputs to the same package shape.

implemented_capabilities.current_evidence_boundary: Generates reproducibility records for local artifact generation.
implemented_capabilities.next_evidence_step: Keep manifest fields aligned with generated artifacts and command coverage.

implemented_capabilities.current_evidence_boundary: Generates a public index of current registry inputs and generated artifacts.
implemented_capabilities.next_evidence_step: Add new artifact families only after generator and validation coverage exist.

implemented_capabilities.current_evidence_boundary: Generates a public entry point for inspecting current artifact-system outputs.
implemented_capabilities.next_evidence_step: Keep the packet refreshed as new generated entry points are added.

implemented_capabilities.current_evidence_boundary: Runs local metadata checks and example generators for a deterministic dry-run report.
implemented_capabilities.next_evidence_step: Add broader dry-run coverage only after public-safe task contracts are stable.

implemented_capabilities.current_evidence_boundary: Runs current deterministic artifact generators through one local command.
implemented_capabilities.next_evidence_step: Integrate the evidence matrix into unified generation in a later bounded run.

implemented_capabilities.current_evidence_boundary: Runs current local validation and generation checks through one command.
implemented_capabilities.next_evidence_step: Integrate evidence-matrix presence checks in a later bounded run.

limitations: This matrix is generated from repository metadata, generated examples, and local commands only.
It maps implemented artifact infrastructure, not biological or therapeutic performance.
It does not load datasets, run acquisition, call external services, run ML, or score candidates.
It records evidence boundaries for current public artifacts and does not expand scientific claims.
next_evidence_steps: Integrate this matrix into unified generation in a later bounded run.
Add validation coverage for matrix file presence in a later bounded run.
Keep new public claims tied to generated artifacts, commands, limitations, and non-claims.
overview: This public evidence matrix maps current Permea Core artifact capabilities to generated artifacts, reproducible local commands, validation evidence, explicit non-claims, limitations, and next evidence steps.
